velocity_vs_rigour_quote: with a strong focus on scalability, clarity and long-term robustness
velocity_vs_rigour_reasoning: Multiple rigour signals (scalability, robustness, governance, standards, compliance, quality) with zero velocity signals.
domain_risk_quote: Data privacy, security, and compliance knowledge
domain_risk_reasoning: Financial domain (automotive leasing) implies higher risk, but JD emphasizes analytics architecture without explicit financial reporting or regulatory compliance language.
data_team_maturity_quote: Mentor analytics engineers and analysts on modeling skills and technical standards
data_team_maturity_reasoning: Multiple existing team members and established function indicate mid-stage team, with language like 'define and evolve' and 'lead implementation of AI-driven capabilities' showing scaling and new initiatives.
jd_authorship_quote: Optimise AWS cloud-native services (Glue, Athena, S3, MWAA) to support scalable analytical and AI workloads
jd_authorship_reasoning: Named AWS services with context, specific AI capabilities (text-to-SQL, automated insights, semantic modeling), and architectural language indicate technical hiring manager authorship.
stakeholder_orientation_quote: Deliver high-quality semantic assets that fuel self-serve analytics, reporting and AI-powered insights
stakeholder_orientation_reasoning: The primary audience is internal analytics consumers and self-serve users of the semantic layer; responsibilities centre on platform infrastructure, team enablement, and internal analytics capabilities rather than commercial, product, or finance stakeholders.
autonomy_level_quote: Set technical direction and drive adoption of modern modeling practices across the organization
autonomy_level_reasoning: The role is expected to set technical direction, define architecture, and lead implementation of new capabilities; the dominant verbs are 'Define', 'Set', 'Lead', and 'Drive', with no language indicating scope is set by others.
greenfield_vs_fix_quote: Define and evolve the architecture for enterprise analytical models
ai_role_quote: Deliver high-quality semantic assets that fuel self-serve analytics, reporting and AI-powered insights
ai_role_reasoning: Candidate builds semantic infrastructure (models, assets) that AI systems consume
testing_framing_quote: Mentor analytics engineers and analysts on modeling skills and technical standards
testing_framing_reasoning: No mention of testing ownership, data contracts, or quality practice responsibility
loss_aversion_framing_quote: Data privacy, security, and compliance knowledge
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Compliance and regulatory trust are core role requirements, not operational secondary concerns
